results.title: 2026's Sleeper Hit Horror Gem Soars Past a Major Paramount+ Milestone
results.description: 2026's most underrated horror movie, Primate, has just nailed a streaming milestone. Here's everything you should know.

results.title: Margaret Qualley Shuts Down Cheating Rumours Surrounding Split With Jack Antonoff
results.description: A representative for actress Margaret Qualley has shut down rumours surrounding her shock split with Grammy-winning husband, Jack Antonoff. Early last week, sources who claim to be close to the couple confirmed they have separated following three years of marriage, with another insider adding that they’re “figuring things out”. While a reason for the [...] The post Margaret Qualley Shuts Down Cheating Rumours Surrounding Split With Jack Antonoff appeared first on PEDESTRIAN.TV .

results.title: Tulu film ‘Gajanana Cricketers’ completes 50 days in theatres
results.description: Daijiworld Media Network – Mangaluru Mangaluru, Jul 12: Tulu film ‘Gajanana Cricketers (Jantottu Since 1983)’, produced under the banner of Prajwal Films by Prajwal Shetty and directed by Keerthan Bhandary, which released on May 22 has completed a 50-day run at theatres....

results.title: Robert Pattinson shares why he loves playing the villain; 'That's always my favourite place to be'
results.description: Robert Pattinson reflected on portraying morally complex characters and explained what draws him to some of his most unconventional roles.
